commands.review_summary:
The PR escapes Teams mention display names before inserting them into `<at>...</at>` tags and adds parser regression tests for markup and closing-tag injection names.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +29. Total +33 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main builds `<at>${trimmedName}</at>` directly, and `buildActivity` sends that parser output as Teams activity text/entities. I did not establish a live Teams reproduction in this read-only review.
